reviews.comment:
El servicio de auxilio mecanico  jamas atendio, y cuando luego de varios intentos  luego de mas de media hora esperando, en linea,  te contestan de mala forma que "no sos el unico, que esperes". Una verdadera verguenza, un servicio que decayo y que no vale la pena adquirir.

(Translated by Google)
The roadside assistance service never answered, and when, after several attempts and more than half an hour on hold, they rudely told me, "You're not the only one, just wait." A real disgrace, a service that has deteriorated and is not worth using.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dkt6Q1ZBEAE
